primary.title: Primary Sit — Core Converge
primary.reasoning: Win strength: Narrow. Breaks if: movement loads harder into the backup lane than this shelf. State Game Land 204 stays legal here; 695 m on a upper third bench. Primary read: Bench Bedding Edge. Support: terrain continuity. This sit is level with the surrounding pull with a flatter shelf on the side-hill, which creates a more believable hunting setup than a flat random point. It also holds better interior security than a boundary-hugging sit. Feature read: active=bench, cover; inactive=ridge, edge, open. General weighting keeps the base terrain read dominant. Vegetation read: shrub cover adds workable concealment and modestly strengthens travel and bedding confidence. This read came from terrain fallback rather than direct land-cover data, so confidence stays slightly tempered. Cover proxy: thicker-feeling travel structure adds security to movement here. Feeding proxy: bench-edge and lower-shelf terrain adds a mild destination pull. Competitive read: this is a narrow win over the nearest backup because it carries slightly cleaner total terrain fit. Conditional read: this stays viable unless movement loads harder into the backup lane than this shelf.
primary.feature_readout: Feature read: active=bench, cover; inactive=ridge, edge, open. General weighting keeps the base terrain read dominant.

corridors.name: Dominant Corridor
corridors.reasoning: Main travel line between the strongest legal sit positions along upper structure.

corridors.name: Secondary Corridor A
corridors.reasoning: Fallback connection between alternate sits when the primary lane is compromised.

notes: Selected bbox is enforced as a hard analysis fence before ranking and viewer payload generation.
Only legal areas can surface primary or alternate sits when verified legal candidates exist.
Restricted and unknown areas remain visible as suppressed near-misses.
Ranking now adds relative terrain trust logic so convergence, shoulder, funnel, bench, and edge reads come from the DEM instead of presentation-only phrasing.
Ranking blends terrain structure, legal gating, timing fit, and wind guard logic.
When no verified legal candidates exist inside the selected bbox, the system falls back to terrain-only review mode instead of crashing.
Provider health now reduces confidence and score when terrain or legal data is degraded.
Vegetation classification now meaningfully changes concealment, bedding confidence, and weak-cover penalties inside sit scoring.

summary.best_time_window: 2.5 hours before sunset through last light

species_profile.label: General Terrain Read
species_profile.positive_hook: General terrain read is active, so Monahinga™ is using the normal terrain-first scoring without species tuning.
species_profile.caution_hook: Select a target species only when you want the terrain read tuned to animal-specific behavior.

invalidators: Wind drifts into the preferred approach lane.
Access pressure rises on the legal edge.
The route forces you through the hot corridor instead of offsetting from it.
Terrain quality or legal verification is too weak to trust the sit call.
